summary: See clues file for full details. 3 tossups, 9 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 3 tossups and 9 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: A woman in this play asks a girl reading Othello if she is in love with an actor, because "why else should you be reading Othello?" When a repentant burglar in this play says to take him to the police, the other characters try to convince him to become a locksmith, although he may have to steal some money to get the business started.
examples: A woman in this play asks a girl reading Othello if she is in love with an actor, because "why else should you be reading Othello?" When a repentant burglar in this play says to take him to the police, the other characters try to convince him to become a locksmith, although he may have to steal some money to get the business started.

clues.clue: The central patriarch of this play is thought to have sold his soul to the devil in Zanzibar.
examples: The central patriarch of this play is thought to have sold his soul to the devil in Zanzibar.

clues.clue: In a puppet play by this play's author, the author asks Shakespeare, "Couldst thou have written [this play]?
examples: In a puppet play by this play's author, the author asks Shakespeare, "Couldst thou have written [this play]?

clues.clue: Behold my Lear" before this play's central patriarch is shown seated as in the painting The North-West Passage.
examples: Behold my Lear" before this play's central patriarch is shown seated as in the painting The North-West Passage.

clues.clue: An explosion of dynamite stored in a gravel pit occurs during an (*) air raid at the end of this play, which ends with the stage direction, "Randall at last succeeds in keeping the home fires burning on his flute." Boss Mangan is in love with Hector's wife Hesione Hushabye  in this play, in which Ellie Dunn resolves to live with an old sailor.
examples: An explosion of dynamite stored in a gravel pit occurs during an (*) air raid at the end of this play, which ends with the stage direction, "Randall at last succeeds in keeping the home fires burning on his flute." Boss Mangan is in love with Hector's wife Hesione Hushabye  in this play, in which Ellie Dunn resolves to live with an old sailor.

clues.clue: In a painting by this artist, a reclining ornithologist shows a stuffed bird of paradise to a group of children.
examples: In a painting by this artist, a reclining ornithologist shows a stuffed bird of paradise to a group of children.

clues.clue: This artist made a painting of a dog jumping up on a man with his arm in a sling who is embracing his wife, who hands a piece of paper to a guard.
examples: This artist made a painting of a dog jumping up on a man with his arm in a sling who is embracing his wife, who hands a piece of paper to a guard.

clues.clue: After ending her unconsummated marriage to John Ruskin, Effie Gray married this artist.
examples: After ending her unconsummated marriage to John Ruskin, Effie Gray married this artist.

clues.clue: This painter of The Ruling Passion and The Order of (*) Release sparked a controversy over realism with a painting in which wood shavings litter the floor of a carpentry shop where a red-headed boy is tended to by his parents.
examples: This painter of The Ruling Passion and The Order of (*) Release sparked a controversy over realism with a painting in which wood shavings litter the floor of a carpentry shop where a red-headed boy is tended to by his parents.

clues.clue: He also painted a Shakespeare character floating down a stream.
examples: He also painted a Shakespeare character floating down a stream.

clues.clue: A print by Frederic Sandys parodies one of this man's paintings by showing him with two fellow artists on a donkey, in place of two children ferried across a ford by the golden-armored Sir Isumbras.
examples: A print by Frederic Sandys parodies one of this man's paintings by showing him with two fellow artists on a donkey, in place of two children ferried across a ford by the golden-armored Sir Isumbras.

clues.clue: In another of his works, two girls play with toy animals as their father holds a newspaper announcing the end of the Crimean War.
examples: In another of his works, two girls play with toy animals as their father holds a newspaper announcing the end of the Crimean War.
